---
name: Pull Request
about: Describe your changes
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR does.

Related issue(s): Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking fix for an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking addition)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test coverage improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Internal refactor (no behavior change)

## Changes Made

- 
- 
- 

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass: `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Concurrency tests include timeouts to detect deadlocks
- [ ] Tested on Python 3.9+ (and 3.13 free-threading if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style guide (PEP 8, type hints, docstrings)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] No new external dependencies introduced
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if any)
